top_signals.title: New bipartisan bill would let retirees use their 401(k) to make direct charitable donations
top_signals.summary: Under current law, qualified charitable distributions — which are available to people age 70 1/2 — can only be made from individual retirement accounts.

alerts.title: New bipartisan bill would let retirees use their 401(k) to make direct charitable donations
alerts.summary: Under current law, qualified charitable distributions — which are available to people age 70 1/2 — can only be made from individual retirement accounts.
